report.title: WorkflowAI Pro: The Six-Layer Enterprise AI Stack (EAIS) & Data Architecture
report.abstract: This report details the architectural foundation of WorkflowAI Pro, specifying a six-layer isolation model that separates reasoning, interoperability, and governance. It defines the high-level data flows between the Experience Layer and the Brain (GeminiService), the role of AWS Nitro Enclaves in infrastructure safety, and the core API boundaries for enterprise deployment.
report.content:
# 1. The Six-Layer Enterprise AI Stack (EAIS)
WorkflowAI Pro implements the EAIS to ensure that high-velocity AI workflows remain regulator-defensible and semantically grounded.
## 1.1 Layer Isolation Model 1. **Experience Layer (Frontend)**: Next.js/React application providing adaptive UI components and ChatOps integrations (Slack/Teams). 2. **Immune System (Governance Plane)**: **Sentinel v2.4**. Intercepts all requests via GDL (Governance Description Language) sidecars to enforce OPA policies and hardware kill-switches. 3. **Nervous System (Interoperability Plane)**: **EAIP (Enterprise AI Interoperability Protocol)**. Provides mTLS-secured gRPC communication, SPIFFE identity, and Recursive Context Envelopes (RCE). 4. **Brain Layer (Reasoning Plane)**: **GeminiService**. Manages frontier reasoning kernels, task decomposition, and PID-based alignment tuning. 5. **Memory Layer (Context Plane)**: High-Assurance RAG utilizing Vector DBs with zero-trust PII redaction and Merkle-DAG provenance tracking. 6. **Foundation Layer (Infrastructure Plane)**: AWS Nitro Enclaves providing Trusted Execution Environments (TEE) and HardwareEnclaveAttestor (HEA) logs.
## 1.2 Core Data Flows - **User Intent**: User (Experience Layer) -> REST API -> Sentinel L5 (Policy Check) -> Brain L4 (Task Decomposition). - **Agentic reasoning**: Brain L4 -> gRPC/EAIP (Nervous System L3) -> Peer Agent -> Memory L5 (Context Retrieval) -> Hardware Enclave (Execution). - **Governance Telemetry**: Every step emits a "Governance Pulse" to a zero-trust Apache Kafka cluster for WORM auditing.
## 1.3 API Boundaries - **External (REST)**: `/api/v1/workflows`, `/api/v1/registry`, `/api/v1/safety-reports`. - **Internal (gRPC)**: `TaskService.Execute`, `ContextService.Retrieve`, `IdentityService.Attest`.
